description: SFX manifest — maps sound keys to ElevenLabs-generated OGG files. Falls back to procedural if file missing.

menu_move.prompt: Soft wooden tap, gentle muted click like a pen on a desk, quiet and warm, no harshness

menu_select.prompt: Soft warm confirmation chime, gentle marimba-like tap with a tiny sparkle, muted and pleasant

menu_cancel.prompt: Soft muted back button sound, gentle low woody thunk, quiet cancellation, not harsh

menu_expand.prompt: Soft paper unfold sound, gentle rustling with a quiet pop, menu expanding, warm and muted

menu_open.prompt: Gentle wooden door creak opening, warm quiet shop entrance, cozy and inviting, not loud

advance_queue.prompt: Muted drum hit with weight, deep soft thump like placing a heavy book, action committed, warm bass

advance_undo.prompt: Quick soft rewinding tape sound, gentle backward whoosh, action undone, quiet and smooth

defer.prompt: Gentle exhale breath sound, soft patient waiting sigh, calm and restful, shield resting

player_turn.prompt: Gentle two-note xylophone ding-dong, soft and melodic turn notification, warm wooden mallet on bar, not shrill

autobattle_on.prompt: Soft mechanical gear engaging, quiet click-whirr of automation starting, warm analog machine hum

autobattle_off.prompt: Soft mechanical gear disengaging, quiet winding down click, automation stopping gently

autobattle_open.prompt: Soft scroll unfurling, papery rustling with a gentle magical hum, script editor opening

autobattle_close.prompt: Soft scroll rolling up, paper curling gently with a quiet thud, script closed

chest_open.prompt: Wooden chest lid creaking open with a gentle sparkle of coins inside, treasure found, warm and rewarding

tier_zoom_out.prompt: Soft receding whoosh, gentle pulling away, muted camera dolly back, smooth and quiet

tier_zoom_in.prompt: Soft approaching whoosh, gentle pushing forward, muted camera dolly in, smooth and quiet

speed_change.prompt: Quick soft clock ticking faster, gentle tempo shift click, time acceleration tick-tick, warm and short

attack_hit.prompt: Quick satisfying sword swing and connect, clean blade whoosh followed by a tight pop impact, classic RPG melee hit, not heavy or harsh

attack_miss.prompt: Quick light whoosh of air, sword swinging through nothing, gentle breeze-like miss, soft and airy

critical_hit.prompt: Dramatic but warm impact, deep resonant boom with a bright accent flash, powerful but not harsh, satisfying critical strike

damage_taken.prompt: Soft dull impact thud, muffled hit on leather armor, quiet pain impact, not sharp or harsh

enemy_death.prompt: Monster dissolving into smoke, soft crackling disintegration fading away, gentle poof of defeat

heal.prompt: Gentle wind chimes in a warm breeze, soft tinkling restoration, soothing and peaceful healing sound, delicate

buff.prompt: Gentle ascending harp glissando, soft magical strengthening, warm upward sweep of strings, encouraging

debuff.prompt: Soft descending muted horn, gentle weakening wobble, low mournful fading tone, not harsh

victory.prompt: Triumphant warm brass fanfare melody, classic RPG victory jingle, celebratory but not blaring, joyful short tune

defeat.prompt: Sad gentle piano descending, somber quiet game over melody, melancholic and soft, fading to silence

status_poison.prompt: Quiet bubbling liquid, soft toxic gurgle like a potion going wrong, sickly wet dripping, muted

status_sleep.prompt: Gentle lullaby music box winding down, soft sleepy descending notes, drowsy tinkling fading out

status_confuse.prompt: Wobbly cartoon dizzy sound, gentle spiraling birds-circling-head, comical wobble, soft and playful

status_paralyze.prompt: Quick soft electric zap then frozen stillness, gentle static crackle locking up, quiet stun

phase_select.prompt: Tiny soft bell ting, very gentle notification ping, barely there, quiet and warm

phase_execute.prompt: Soft deep drum beat, single muted bass drum thump signaling action, warm and authoritative but quiet

ability_fire.prompt: Roaring campfire erupting, warm crackling flames whooshing upward, deep orange fire with wood pops and snaps, cozy but powerful

ability_ice.prompt: Cracking frozen lake, sharp crystalline ice forming rapidly, cold brittle snapping with frosty wind howl, winter blizzard

ability_lightning.prompt: Close thunderclap with electric buzzing aftermath, raw thunder strike with static discharge crackling, stormy atmospheric

ability_holy.prompt: Cathedral pipe organ chord with heavenly choir voices, sacred resonant golden light, deep reverberant church acoustics, divine

ability_dark.prompt: Deep underground rumble with whispering ghostly voices, dark cavern echoing void, eerie low vibration with distant wailing

ability_physical.prompt: Quick clean sword unsheathing and slicing through air, sharp steel ring fading, precise blade technique, elegant not brutal

ability_heal.prompt: Gentle rain on leaves with soft harp notes, nature healing sounds, birdsong and dewdrops, peaceful restoration, warm
